title: 采集Docker容器日志（标准输出/文件）-日志服务(SLS)-阿里云帮助中心
heading_path: LoongCollector镜像地址 docker pull aliyun-observability-release-registry.${region_id}.cr.aliyuncs.com/loongcollector/loongcollector:v3.0.12.0-25723a1-aliyun # Logtail镜像地址 docker pull registry.${region_id}.aliyuncs.com/log-service/logtail:v2.1.11.0-aliyun > 步骤四：验证与故障排查 > 查看上报日志
